description: CompositionPurple shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest, a full buttoned placket and a curved hemFitindigo nation Edgy FitWash careWash dark colours separatelyHand wash or machine wash coldUse mild detergentFlat dry in shadeDo not wring, bleach, iron on printThis impeccably designed casual shirt from indigo nation, styled like a formal shirt remains a timeless classic.
